jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at NABARD
jsonLd.description:
We at NABARD are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NABARD:
NABARD is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NABARD!
